title: Lugia for Cobblemon
description: This add-on is intended to add Lugia into your Cobblemon world! Search deep oceans for this mystical legendary!
body:
⚠️ | Install this add-on both on the server as a datapack, and on the client as a resource pack. One file for both locations!

💧 | Since Lugia is not in the base game, I have decided to do it myself. This Legendary is now available for Cobblemon! There may be bugs and other glitches that will be fixed, so take care.


❓ | FAQ

- How do I get the Cobblemon in this pack?

Lugia will spawn in the deep ocean during night when it's thundering. Don't expect this to be easy however, it won't give itself up easily and will spawn at a high level.

- Can I add this into my pack? Make a video on this?

Go for it! Credit would be nice though :)
